summary: Tested new 3-type pricing architecture (internal/external/enquiry). Found and fixed a critical backend bug. All 17 backend tests pass (100%). All 13 frontend features verified via Playwright. The backend had a critical regression introduced by incomplete refactoring of the intake schema validation code.

critical.issue: FIXED: _validate_intake_schema() in catalog.py accessed schema.questions.dropdown (old grouped format) but IntakeSchemaJson.questions is now List[IntakeQuestion] (flat array). Caused AttributeError 500 whenever intake_schema_json was provided (which the UI always sends). Also fixed _normalize_schema_dict() for new flat format and audit_details in admin_create_product.

issues: A blank/unnamed category shows '1' count in sidebar below CRM(24). Likely test products with empty category. Minor cosmetic issue.

design_issues.screen: Store offering cards - From pricing label
issues: Text extraction shows 'From£125' (no space). Visually correct with CSS mr-1 margin but the prefix span and price span are rendered adjacent without a space character. Not a visual bug but worth noting.

passed_tests: Admin login via partner-login (admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123!)
Catalog tab shows 45+ products (≥21 seeded required)
Catalog products have new pricing types (internal/external/enquiry)
Public /api/products endpoint returns products
Create internal product (no intake schema) - POST 200, pricing_type=internal
Create internal product WITH intake questions (number + dropdown) - POST 200 after fix
Create external product with external_url - POST 200, pricing_type=external
Create enquiry product - POST 200, pricing_type=enquiry
PUT /api/admin/products/:id - update pricing_type → 200
PUT /api/admin/products/:id with intake_schema_json → 200 after fix
POST /api/pricing/calc for internal (base_price only) → subtotal=500.0
POST /api/pricing/calc for internal with number intake (base=100 + 3×50=250) → correct
POST /api/pricing/calc for external → requires_checkout=False, external_url set
POST /api/pricing/calc for enquiry → is_enquiry=True, requires_checkout=False
Store shows internal products with £X labels
Store shows external products with 'Visit site' labels
Store shows enquiry products with 'Get in touch' labels
Product edit dialog opens with 5 tabs: General, Store Card, Pricing, Visibility, Content
Pricing tab shows 3 type cards: Internal Checkout, External Link, Enquiry Only
Internal type: base_price field + intake builder + Add question button all visible
External type: only external URL field shown (base_price and intake hidden)
Enquiry type: only informational text (no price/URL fields)
Add Number intake question → shows label, min, max, step, price_per_unit fields
Add Dropdown intake question → shows label, options, affects_price toggle
Affects price toggle → enables Price adj. column + per-option price input fields
New product creation via UI → 'Product created' toast, dialog closes
Product update (PUT) via UI → 'Product updated' toast, dialog closes
Dropdown question 'Service Type' persists after reload
action_items: MINOR: Store sidebar shows blank category with count '1' - some test products may have empty category string
COSMETIC: 'From £X' price labels - the prefix span and price span could include a space character (not just CSS margin) for better text accessibility
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED (catalog.py): _validate_intake_schema() and _normalize_schema_dict() used old grouped format API (schema.questions.dropdown etc.) but IntakeSchemaJson model was updated to flat List[IntakeQuestion]. All 3 occurrences fixed: _validate_intake_schema, _normalize_schema_dict, and audit_details in admin_create_product.
catalog.py line 170: product.pop('price_inputs', None) - remnant from old pricing model, harmless but could be cleaned up
ProductForm.tsx: no data-testid on BulletsList items for individual bullets but this is minor
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST95_* prefixed products: TEST95_Internal_NoIntake, TEST95_Internal_WithIntake, TEST95_External_Product, TEST95_Enquiry_Product, TEST95_Update_Pricing, TEST95_Update_IntakeSchema, TEST95_Calc_BaseOnly, TEST95_Calc_NumberIntake, TEST95_Calc_External, TEST95_Calc_Enquiry, TEST95_Store_Internal, TEST95_Store_External, TEST95_Store_Enquiry. UI test created TEST95_UI_Intake_Product.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pricing architecture is now 3-type: internal/external/enquiry. Critical backend bug fixed in catalog.py (_validate_intake_schema, _normalize_schema_dict, audit_details). All features working: product form 5 tabs, 3 pricing type cards with conditional UI, intake builder with number+dropdown question types, store card labels (£X/Visit site/Get in touch), pricing calc endpoint. TEST95_* products exist in CRM category. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_iter95_pricing_arch.py.

rca_of_issue.root_cause: New IntakeSchemaJson model changed questions field from a grouped dict (with .dropdown, .multiselect, etc. sub-arrays) to a flat List[IntakeQuestion]. The _validate_intake_schema and _normalize_schema_dict functions were not updated to match the new model structure, causing AttributeError: 'list' object has no attribute 'dropdown' on any POST/PUT that included intake_schema_json.
rca_of_issue.fix_applied: Updated _validate_intake_schema to iterate over schema.questions list directly. Updated _normalize_schema_dict to handle flat array format (with legacy grouped format fallback). Updated audit_details to use len(questions) instead of accessing non-existent grouped attributes.
rca_of_issue.reproduction: POST /api/admin/products with intake_schema_json: {version:2, questions:[{type:'number',...}]} → 500 AttributeError before fix, 200 after fix
